recommendations.title: 7 Women and a Murder
recommendations.overview: When the family patriarch is murdered, seven women find themselves trapped together in his mansion to solve the mystery.

recommendations.overview: A stressed-out mom takes off on a 10-day solo vacation, sending her family into chaos as the dad tries to take over the household duties.

recommendations.overview: High school professor Guido is a hopeless romantic whose life falls apart after his girlfriend leaves him. Paolo, a former student of his, helps him in getting out of his depression for a better chance to become a PE teacher himself.
